_comment: Canonical Godot import presets per asset class (Art SAD §2.3). Single source of truth for both the meridian_import editor plugin (stamps these into .import files) and the CI import validator (tools/validate_imports.py). Grounded in Art PRD §2.3 (VRAM budgets, mipmaps, sizes), §2.1/§2.2 (LOD import), §2.4/§6.1 (lightmap UV2, occluder, collision), and the client min-spec/arm64+Metal / D3D12 constraints (TD-02/TD-03, D-28). Texture size caps mirror budgets.json (Art PRD §2.3) but govern the IMPORTED resource, not the source. Compression mode ints match Godot's ResourceImporterTexture: 0=lossless, 1=lossy, 2=VRAM Compressed, 3=uncompressed.

character.cite: Art SAD §2.3 character preset — skeleton + BoneMap to shared rig; blend shapes on; no importer LOD generation (hand-authored, PRD §2.1)

env-kit.cite: Art SAD §2.3 env-kit preset — lightmap UV2 unwrap, occluder node conversion, static collision from col_*, importer LODs OFF (hand-authored chains, PRD §2.1/§2.2)

weapon.cite: Art PRD §2.1 weapon — static mesh attached to a bone attachment (dynamic, not a lightmapped static), hand-authored LOD0-2; no importer LODs, no lightmap UV2 (moves with the character), no occluder/collision

prop.cite: Art SAD §2.3 prop preset — importer-generated LODs ALLOWED (PRD §2.1), UV2 on, shadow-mesh simplification on

foliage.cite: Art SAD §2.3 foliage preset — no UV2 (unlit-shadow path), MultiMesh-safe flags, billboard LOD slot honored; grass single LOD (PRD §2.1)

texture-std.cite: Art SAD §2.3 texture-std preset — BC-class VRAM compression, mipmaps on, source at 2× target (PRD §2.3); UI icons lossless + no mipmaps (screen-space)

vfx-texture.cite: Art SAD §2.3 vfx-texture preset — no mipmap-streaming assumptions, VRAM-compress per channel packing, sRGB/linear per suffix (_bc sRGB, _orm/_n linear). VFX systems shipped as scenes (.tscn) are honored as-is.

audio.cite: Art SAD §2.3 (audio adjunct) / Music SAD §4.2 — .wav kept as PCM for short SFX/UI (low latency); positional 3D sources force-mono. Music streams may be Ogg Vorbis.
